{"id":18,"date":"2013-12-20T17:41:40","date_gmt":"2013-12-21T01:41:40","guid":{"rendered":"http://quantumsf.wordpress.com/?page_id=8"},"modified":"2024-09-19T13:23:30","modified_gmt":"2024-09-19T20:23:30","slug":"adult-class-schedule","status":"publish","type":"page","link":"https://quantumsf.org/adult-class-schedule/","title":{"rendered":"Adult Class Schedule"},"content":{"rendered":"

The Quantum San Francisco Dojo offers online martial arts classes for adults six days a week. New students and beginners are always welcome, and your first week of classes is free! Students pay a monthly membership fee and access to classes is unlimited. If you are interested to check out classes, please let us know you are coming by scheduling an orientation and trial class on this form.

For our latest up-to-date schedule consult and subscribe to our Google Calendar:

You can also tune in to our instagram for regular updates.
